results.text: Dust Storm: Guile disadvantage. Test Fortitude DR12 or take d4 damage and become Fatigued.
Echoes of the Forge: Mines hum with rhythmic creation. Calming presence.
Seismic Tremors: Test Swift DR12 to avoid falling rocks or crevasses.
Cleansing Breeze: Sulphur gas invigorates. +2 to Fortitude Tests for 1 hour.
Unstable Machinery: Malfunctioning gears. Test Swift DR12 or take d6 damage.
Lava Flow: Sudden eruption. Test Swift DR14 or take 2d6 fire damage.

name: Svartalfheim Discoveries
description: Dwarven masterworks and dark elf traps.

results.text: Dwarven Forge: Tools and half-completed weapon. Reactivating might trigger a trap.
Vein of Gleaming Ore: Mining yields valuable trade materials. May draw Dokkalfar.
Crystalised Cave: Precious stones guarded by Crystal Spiders.
Forgotten Vault: Sealed by Runes. Riches guarded by Rock Golems.
Dvalin's Workshop: Cursed artefacts. Test Wits DR14 to handle safely.
Collapsed Mine: Tremors rock the tunnels. Hide lost artefacts.
"The cursed vault of Andvari has been found deep within."
"The tremors have broken the lifeblood of the forges."
"Dvalin's curse is spreading to anyone who handles his tools."
"The Dark Elves (Dokkalfar) are gathering for something big."
"The Dwarven forges are burning too hot... the mountain might fall."
